## Hypothesis
What are we trying to learn?

## Team / Requirement
Team owner and related requirement ID, or explain why this is exploratory.

## Experiment Design
What will be changed or measured?

## Success Criteria
How do we know the experiment succeeded?

## Rollback / Cleanup
How do we reset the POC after the experiment?

## References
Add docs, links, or prior issues.
